## Pull Request

### Description

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

### Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

### Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on all changed files (`shellcheck -x <files>`)
- [ ] `bats tests/` passes
- [ ] New functions have bats tests where practical
- [ ] No secrets / credentials in commits or logs
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing change)
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if user-facing behaviour changed)

### Related issues

Closes #...
